Description

Summary
Visually styled sub-heading “DEFRA Data Protection Officer” is not marked up programmatically as a heading, causing accessibility barriers for screen‑reader users.

image-20260325-174331.png

URL - https://fes-ext.pre.private.defra.gov.uk/create-catch-certificate/privacy-notice
Page Title - Privacy Notice - Create a UK catch certificate 
Journey - 1 – Step 3

Description

On the Privacy Notice page, directly beneath the H2: “Who collects your Personal Information”, there is a visually styled sub-heading “DEFRA Data Protection Officer”.

Although it visually functions as a heading, it is currently implemented as paragraph text.

This is not programmatically recognised as a heading, preventing screen reader users from understanding and navigating the page structure in the same way as sighted users. 

This means screen reader users cannot effectively navigate content quickly.

Change

Update the visually styled sub-heading as a h3.

Text

Current Style

New Style

DEFRA Data Protection Officer

Paragraph

h3

Acceptance Criteria

The sub-heading “DEFRA Data Protection Officer” marked up using appropriate heading element <h3>.
